compiled_text_prompt: Context_Control. Create a top-down fixed-palette semantic livingroom layout. Include the required semantic furniture categories: coffee_table, dining_chair, dining_table. Keep furniture inside the room floor region, preserve openings, and avoid blocking usable access. Use the architecture condition image for the room floor boundary and visible doors. Arrange the room for clear indoor function using only allowed semantic categories.
notes: mock review client used; no rule fallback
